title: Timber Physics
body:
# This pack adds Timber Physics!
If you chop a naturally spawned Tree with an Axe, it will fall over!

Compatible with Custom Trees from other Datapacks

If you want to chopp Nether Trees download [this addon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/timber-physics-nether-addon). 


[Example of chopping Oak](https://i.imgur.com/lm6njVb.mp4)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/KA1opznvS0I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Customisation Options:
- To get into the options do /trigger physicstimber.help
- Choose whether sneaking should not trigger the Timber or if it should only trigger when sneaking. (Player specific)
- Choose the max Size a Tree can have for Timber to be triggered. (Admin only option, global)

If you are wielding an Axe with Silk Touch, Timber will not trigger.

### Technical info:
This pack can be very taxing for Servers and Clients when big trees are chopped! Keep that in mind.


Max Tree size options explained:

- Small: [​up to 15 Logs and 100 Leaves]
- all Vanilla Trees that are not large Trees

- Medium: [​up to 150 Logs and 400 Leaves]
- all Vanilla Trees

- Large: [​up to 200 Logs and 800 Leaves] <- Default Option!
- most Custom Trees

- Absurd: [​up to 600 Logs and 2500 Leaves]
- basically anything that´s not really ridiculous

If a Tree is larger than the selected Max size, Timber wont trigger for it. (It will not fall over)


How a Tree is defined:

- Having 3+ Logs and at least 1 Leaf that is non persistent ([​persistent=false]) connected to one of the Logs
- Each Log looks for connected Logs (also diagonal) so if there are Logs in your Tree that have a one Block distance to other Logs they are not considered to be part of the Tree!
